description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages (test and deploy) that uses a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME storing node_modules/, bower_components/ and .yarn and includes untracked files. In the test stage add a job named test that runs on the nullvoxpopuli/ember-cli:2.14.1-2 Docker image (tagged docker), executes `time ( yarn install && bower install )` then `time npm run ci`, and publishes the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job named production that depends on test, runs on the same Docker image, runs only on the master branch, exports DEPLOY_TARGET=production and the REDISCLOUD, AWS and Stripe environment variables, prints the Ember version with `ember --version`, and finally runs `time DEPLOY_ENV=$DEPLOY_TARGET ember deploy $DEPLOY_TARGET --activate`.
